case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. WEI MING ZENG ET AL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-21-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100050165) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK F/K/A AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-21-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
